summary: As more companies develop electric vehicles, the first metric consumers look to for comparison is range. headline: Q2 Was Pure Heaven For The Video Game Industry
summary: On Monday, NPD Group published a report that reveals that video game spending in the United States skyrocketed. Furthermore, it reached new heights during the second quarter. The pandemic and the resulting efforts to contain the spread of COVID-19 helped the industry realize revenues of $11.6 billion between April and June. This marks a 30% increase on a year-over-year basis.

headline: The Dow Jones Shows The Toll Of COVID-19
summary: Throughout their history, the Dow and S&P 500 have been used interchangeably to describe the overall stock market. For a long time, the Dow was the market to nearly all investors. It is easier to analyze 30 as opposed to 500 stocks. But these days, the S&P 500 is more quoted, largely because the financial services industry has endorsed it.
